raw_source.title: [Remote] TonUP is looking for Marketing Associate
raw_source.body:
## About
TonUP is an innovative platform built on the TON Blockchain that aims to revolutionize the way projects are launched and supported in the crypto space. It provides a comprehensive ecosystem for token launches, community participation, and project growth. TonUP is on a mission to discover and nurture the most promising projects out there, bringing exciting opportunities to the wider community. With the unwavering support of TON Foundation and Foresight X, they are dedicated to empowering assets with remarkable potential on the TON Blockchain, fostering the growth of a vibrant TON ecosystem.

## Job Description:
The Opportunity:
We are seeking a driven and creative Marketing & Growth Specialist to join our team. In this role, you'll take the lead in developing and imblementing strategies to boost our brand awareness. attract new customers, and fuel company growth. If you have a passion for marketing, a knack for content creation, and strong project management skills, this is an excellent opportunity to make a significant Impact on our expanding business
*Please note, this position requires managing multiple projects simultaneously, necessitating a certain level of multi-tasking ability.

## Responsibilities:
- Daily Marketing Activities: Execute and optimize daily marketing campaigns across various channel's and platforms
- Content Creation: Develop compelling written content, including blog posts, social media updates, and website copy. with a focus on Twitter engagement
- Partnership Management: Handle coordination and communication with external partners and outsourced resources
- Data Analysis: Track and analyze marketing metrics to measure campaign effectiveness and inform future strategies
- Growth Strategies: Collaborate with the team to develop innovative growth marketing concepts and initiatives

## Job Requirements:
Qualifications:
-  English Fluency: Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English as the primary working language
- Tech Savviness: Proficiency in Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides), ChatGPT, Slack, and Monday.
- Communication Style: Comfortable with asynchronous communication and a strong emphasis on using documentation to exchange information effectively.
- Experience: At least 2 years of relevant experience in a marketing or growth-focused role.
- Problem-Solving Mindset: Open-minded, proactive, and solution-oriented approach to challenges

Preferred Qualifications:
- Industry Experience: Prior work experience in a mature internet company
- Global Exposure: Stud abroad background in an English-speaking Country
- Crypto Expertise: Experience in the cryptocurrency space ability to provide a crypto address is a strong plus)

Bonus Points
- Experience with SEO/SEM
- Familiarity with graphic design tools (e.g., Figma)
- Knowledge of social media advertising


## Job Nature

- Full-time
- Remote

## Salary and Benefits
$2,000 - $4,000 / month
Benefits:
- Cutting-edge Projects: Work on the forefront of blockchain technology, contributing to projects that could redefine industries.
- Growth Opportunities: Continuous learning environment where you can hone existing skills and acquire new ones in the fast-evolving Web3 space.
- Collaborative Culture: Be part of a supportive, inclusive team that values your input and encourages sharing of ideas.
- Competitive Compensation: Attractive salary and potential for blockchain/token incentives.


## Contact
elena.liu@msino.io
